name: LOT OF TROUBLE! (And so Are you!)
description: I'm in a LOT OF TROUBLE! (And so Are you!)
hints: You are dead. This is the game-over room with no exits.
Restore a saved game or restart. Avoid jumping from the ledge and watch out for the Count at night.
notes: Death/game-over room. No exits. Reached by jumping from the ledge, getting caught by the Count at night without garlic, or other fatal actions.
